comment_text: After the latest update Face ID login keeps failing and I cannot access my account.
Face ID stopped working after the new version and now I am locked out.
The verification code never arrives and I cannot sign in.
Login keeps failing and password reset does not work.
The app keeps crashing whenever I try to upload a document.
Uploading documents fails every time and support told me to try later.
The portal shows an unknown error when I upload my PDF document.
The page keeps loading forever and then shows an unknown error.
The app is very slow and freezes when I check my dashboard.
I wish the dashboard had better filters and easier navigation.
Customer service keeps transferring me and nobody helps with my account issue.
Support keeps putting me on hold and nobody gives a clear answer.
I cannot download my monthly statement from the app.
I was charged twice and I still did not receive a refund.
There is an unauthorized transaction and the dispute process is confusing.
I see suspicious activity and I cannot get help with my dispute.
The app is good but the navigation could be cleaner.
After the latest update the document section is broken.
Version 9.94.0 broke sign in and I cannot access anything.
Refund status is unclear and the billing page does not explain the charge.
